description: Deterministic §Teach branch routing — one case per branch in scripts/teach-route.mjs. Verifies the payload lands at the expected branch + reference (or non-reference target). Run via the shared run-skill-evals.mjs (--corpus=teach) or teach-router.mjs runEval.

cases.payload: a new response field the adapter must map in parseResponse
cases.rationale: Per-adapter field encoded by the source — not a skill landing.

cases.payload: a new gotcha when you add a new provider adapter
cases.rationale: A step/gotcha in the add-a-4th-provider recipe.

cases.payload: a new StreamChunk type emitted by the SSE parser
a new id-naming convention detectProvider must learn for the model registry
a change to how createAdapter falls back to the stub and the lazy-load gate
a new rule about the passthrough proxy and key in browser safety
a cross-adapter rule about the usage mapping and raw stopReason in buildRequest discipline
cases.rationale: Cross-adapter shape rule — the default branch.

cases.payload: a new posture principle and a new selfaudit axis for the skill
cases.rationale: Posture / mission shift lands inline in SKILL.md.

cases.payload: a one-off debugging story about how I debugged a flaky stream once
cases.rationale: Arc story — NEGATIVE, not a skill landing.
